data.body: COMPLETION_VERIFIER_FINDING: Story DD specifies scanning tool-use-*.jsonl in addition to tool-error-counter.json. Current implementation reads only tool-error-counter.json. Epic SC2 (which only requires tool-error-counter.json) is satisfied. Bug ticket 7fcd-e5bf created for the gap. Closing story as epic SC2 is met; 7fcd-e5bf will track the remaining work.
